title: The World's Greatest Gal ♥ Go! Go! → Ran Kotobuki
overview: Ran is not your typical Gal. But what is a Gal? And what are “ironclad rules of being a Gal?” Ran Kotobuki will teach you! Join Ran as she helps spread world peace, all while being a Gal!

title: Phone Tag Gets Chilling! ♥ Shibuya is Thrilling! → The Great Dragnet
overview: Ran is promised 500 yen to right 10 wrongs. Her first right was catching a girl who tried to steal a purse, but will it turn out to be as mundane a theft as it appears?

title: A Girl's Feelings ♥ Hearts Reeling → Red Streak Or Not, Miyu's Taken!
overview: Things get creepy when Miyu receives a weird love letter in her shoe locker. Will Yamato come to Miyu’s rescue? Ran’s back on the case to help her friend!

title: Have Got? ♥ Have Not? → Luck With Guys?
overview: The Gals are telling their love fortunes, but the future looks bleak for Ran. But when Ran does find love, is he really the right guy for her?

title: Fresh Start? ♥ Broken Heart? → Is It Over With Aya?!
overview: Its exam time and Ran is struggling through them. The bigger problem is top-of-her-class Aya falls several ranks in the scores. She distances herself from Ran and Miyu to get better grades, but what about her Gal life?

overview: The Gals are out looking for jobs again, but they’re being turned down for their looks. When they do find a job at a pastry shop, they have to sell 3,000 Gal pastries by the end of the day. With the help of Rei and Yuuya, it could happen!

title: Hard Working ♥ Super Cop → Ran Kotobuki!
overview: When Ran wins a sleep learning pillow in a raffle, she accidentally brainwashes herself into wanting to become a police officer. But what will happen of Ran’s normal Gal life?

title: Brother ♥ Kichi-kichi → Naokichi Appears!
overview: It’s another Tatsuki. He’s an easy-going boy on a skateboard in Shibuya, and he resembles someone... Who’s the guy? Naoki - Tatsuki’s brother! When he falls in love with Ran, it’s a brother-brother ramen battle for her love!
